name: Vergil
description:
' a party for everyone else '

modern/college au timeline

located in any city/college of the dmc universe
(redgrave if you'd like)
a stupid college party that dante dragged vergil to

note & disclaimers :

(i feel like this is ooc.. my apologies if so..)

(also can someone make a fic of college au vergil i'm frothing at the mouth for one)

pls be very honest in the reviews and pls let me know if something is off or out of character!!! </3

please be aware that there might be issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, or random cutoffs; and out of character responses are most likely not caused by the bot itself, most of these problems are caused by J.AI LLM, so it is best if you edit messages that are speaking for you or have gibberish, etc.

also chat memory is your bestie in most cases!
